channel.title: MYB
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Legal AI Startup Harvey In Talks To Raise $200 Million At $11 Billion Valuation
item.description: The startup, which develops AI software for lawyers and big law firms, is raising additional capital, increasing its valuation from $8 billion just tw...

item.title: The Best Movies About America’s Greatest Innovators
item.description: Great success in business is one thing, making it in Hollywood is another. Here’s a multiplex’s worth of films inspired by iconic innovators—and the b...

item.title: AI Is Breaking Jobs Into Tasks, And That Changes Everything
item.description: AI is not automating jobs in one go; it is disassembling them into tasks, deleting repetitive work, and forcing new human responsibilities to emerge.

item.title: Epomaker Launches Full-Size Gaming Keyboard With Built-In Screen
item.description: The new TH99 Pro wireless gaming keyboard from Epomaker can be extensively customized with fully programmable extensions to suit users' workflow and p...

item.title: Neuro-Symbolic AI Steps Up To Produce Robust Mental Health Treatment Plans
item.description: AI can be used to produce mental health treatment plans. That's already happening. The next era is using neuro-symbolic AI. I lay out the future. An A...

item.title: Process thinking
item.description: Sure, you made it work this time, but will it work next time? Can you teach the method to someone else? Do you have a protocol for what to do when it ...

item.title: Free agency
item.description: Unrestricted free choice is a myth. There are always boundaries and trade-offs. But being fully stuck is also a myth. We might not like the trade offs...

item.title: Vessel size
item.description: “May your cup runneth over…” This begs the question: how big a cup? The logistics of vessel size determine how much money we need to raise, how big a ...

item.title: Voluntary stories
item.description: The narrative we run in our head is a choice. It might or might not be based on objective reality and verified history. Doesn’t matter, it’s still a c...

item.title: Making it whole
item.description: Integrity is the act of being in and of itself, from every angle. As we see the bait-and-switch of the online networks and monopolists, it’s easy to i...
